nasb.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination, How much more when he brings it with evil intent!

esv.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination; how much more when he brings it with evil intent.

cnv.text: 惡人的祭物是耶和華所厭惡的， 更何況是懷著惡念來獻的呢？

ccb.text: 恶人的祭物已经可憎， 何况他怀着恶意来献！

csbs.text: 恶人的祭物尚且可憎， 更何况他献祭时居心不良呢！
